description: `tan -90` is undefined (issue #323): a negative angle at a pole must still raise `ol-div-zero`. This specifically exercises the negative-angle branch of the pole detection — JS's `%` is a remainder, not a mathematical modulo (`-90 % 180 === -90`, not `90`), so the guard must check `degrees % 180 === -90` as well as `=== 90` rather than assuming the remainder is always non-negative.
